title: salix nummularia
intro: Salix nummularia, also known as coin-leaved willow, is a species of willow tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Salix nummularia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Salix nummularia include infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be used to treat various health conditions.
